title: PDF File Keeps Reverting to First Page (Mobile)

posts.author: TechconConstruction (John Kallu)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a construction company. Within one of our Job list board, we upload a copy of the jobsite plans as a PDF within the board columns (File column). I’ve received feedback that when viewing on a mobile device (New iPads) employees are able to open the file; however, as they scroll through the pages, it will send them back to the first page.

What could be causing this and how can I fix it?
